name: agentlint-ai
description: Setup, check, and fix your repo for AI-native development.

scripts.test: npm run test:core && npm run test:js && npm run test:action
scripts.test:core: bash tests/test_compliance.sh && bash tests/test-scanner.sh && bash tests/test-cli-wrapper.sh && bash tests/test-resolve-self.sh && node tests/test-registry-consistency.js && node tests/test-surface-sync.js && bash tests/test-session-analyzer.sh && node tests/test-session-cross-project.js && bash tests/test-deep-analyzer.sh && bash tests/test-setup-hook-fail-closed.sh && bash tests/test-reporter-tty-noinput.sh && bash tests/test-release-yaml-gates.sh
scripts.test:js: node tests/test-scorer.js && node tests/test-plan-generator.js && node tests/test-reporter.js && node tests/test-fixer.js && node tests/test-html-report.js && node tests/test-basename-collision.js
scripts.lint:shell: shellcheck -S warning src/scanner.sh scripts/*.sh && shellcheck -S warning -e SC2329 tests/*.sh
